_meta.description: Synthetic fraud-pattern database for NexusMesh Guard. Patterns modelled on published NICB ForeWarn indicator descriptions and the Carbo et al. (2025) rule-based ensemble. NOT real claimant data.

individual_patterns.name: Early claim
individual_patterns.description: Loss filed within 30 days of policy inception

individual_patterns.name: Round-dollar amount
individual_patterns.description: Claimed amount is a multiple of $500 and exceeds $5,000

individual_patterns.name: OFAC/OIG-flagged provider
individual_patterns.description: Provider matches a federal exclusion / sanctions list entry
individual_patterns.source: OFAC SDN + OIG LEIE standard screening

individual_patterns.name: Duplicate claimant
individual_patterns.description: Same claimant_id appears on multiple distinct claims in the batch

individual_patterns.name: FL PIP staged crash
individual_patterns.description: Florida claim with a flagged tow company and PIP/collision loss within the no-fault window

individual_patterns.name: Ring ZIP cluster
individual_patterns.description: Loss address falls within a known high-incidence fraud-ring ZIP code

individual_patterns.name: Synthetic identity
individual_patterns.description: Identity attributes inconsistent (e.g., SSN issue date postdates claimed age)

individual_patterns.name: Cross-carrier duplicate
individual_patterns.description: Loss event hash matches a claim already filed with another carrier

network_patterns.name: Shared tow company
network_patterns.description: Claims in a ring sharing the same tow company

network_patterns.name: Shared repair + medical provider
network_patterns.description: Claims in a ring sharing both a repair shop and a medical provider
